_comment: ECGiga Case Template — All fields documented below
id: string — Unique case identifier (auto-generated from report hash)
title: string — Human-readable case title, e.g. 'Fibrilacao Atrial em Paciente Idoso'
description: string — Clinical context / history presented to the student
image_url: string — Path or URL to the ECG image (PNG/JPG). May be empty for text-only cases

report._comment: Original structured ECG report used to generate this case

annotations.label: string — Structure label, e.g. 'P_wave', 'QRS', 'T_wave', 'ST_segment'
annotations.description: string — Textual description of the finding at this annotation

boxes.x: number — Top-left X coordinate in pixels
boxes.y: number — Top-left Y coordinate in pixels

questions.correct: number — Zero-based index of the correct option (only for multiple_choice)

annotations.label: string — Same labels as in 'annotations' above
